subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-21 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: This morning we were speaking of the fact that God never leaves anything unexplained. He will make everything manifest, even though it may remain hidden for a long time.
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @resurrection of Christ, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
